question: Why is it important to check the mechanical assembly of a self-built UA?

options.text: Prevent radio systems from being interfered or to interfere other radio equipment.
Ensure no loose wires can come into contact with the spinning propellers.
Ensure that appropriate Center of Gravity is applied.
Ensure all screws are securely fastened and cable ties are applied if necessary.

classification_notes: Mechanical assembly is a UAS component-function check.
